researchPeriod.totalText: Joint Research: 2 years (Humanities/Social Sciences, Science/Engineering, Biology/Medicine, Interdisciplinary) / Joint Seminar: 1 year(2027.4.1.~2028.3.31.), commencement 2027.4.1.
researchPeriod.byStageText: Joint Research Projects: 2 years; Joint Seminars: 1 year (seminar less than a week, held once within the year 2027.4.1.~2028.3.31.)

funding.perYearPerProjectText: Joint Research: Humanities and Social Sciences 15,000,000 KRW/Yr, Science and Engineering·Biology and Medicine·Interdisciplinary 8,000,000 KRW/Yr (Joint Research includes indirect expenses less than 5% of direct)
funding.numAwardsText: Joint Research: 15 new projects; Joint Seminar: 5 new projects

eligibility.employmentEvidence: Researchers at universities/institutes as defined in Article 2 of the Framework Act on Academic Promotion, and be eligible to apply with the official nomination of the head of the affiliated institution.
eligibility.targetSummary: 학술진흥법 제2조에서 정하는 대학·연구기관 소속 연구자로서 소속기관장의 추천을 받아 신청 가능한 자. 전임 여부에 대한 명시적 조건 없이 기관 소속 연구자를 대상으로 함.

evidenceQuotes: Joint Research: 1) Humanities and Social Sciences 15,000,000 KRW/Yr, 2 years, 15 new projects.
8,000,000 KRW/Yr, 1 year (Biology and Medicine / Joint Seminar), 5 new projects.

Researchers at universities/institutes as defined in Article 2 of the Framework Act on Academic Promotion, and be eligible to apply with the official nomination of the head of the affiliated institution.
An applicant can apply for only one category at a time, and participate in only one project whether as a Principal Investigator(PI) or as a participating researcher.
